text:
HP microservers also have this problem.

vgapci0@pci0:1:0:1:     class=0x030000 rev=0x00 hdr=0x00 vendor=0x102b device=0x0533 subvendor=0x103c subdevice=0x3381
    vendor     = 'Matrox Electronics Systems Ltd.'
    device     = 'MGA G200EH'
    class      = display
    subclass   = VGA
